# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

No substantive correctness, safety, or robustness issues were identified in the reviewed final-review concurrency change. The diff in `src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs` preserves per-reviewer failure handling and journal/error semantics while running proposal and vote invocations concurrently, and event emission remains consistent with the existing processing model.

## Amendments

None.
